args.code: (()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1'));const npcData=s.friendship||s.npcMilestones||{};const npcList=Object.entries(npcData).map(([k,v])=>k+':'+(v.level||v.affection||v||0));const weatherMap={sunny:'晴天',rainy:'雨天',cloudy:'多云',windy:'大风',foggy:'雾',snowy:'雪',thunderstorm:'雷暴',drought:'干旱'};const seasonMap={spring:'春季',summer:'夏季',autumn:'秋季',winter:'冬季'};const skillNames={cropFamiliarity:'作物熟悉',fieldManagement:'田地管理',toolMastery:'工具掌握',composting:'堆肥',fishingMastery:'钓鱼'};const skills=Object.entries(s.skills||{}).map(([k,v])=>(skillNames[k]||k)+v.level);const eventHist=Array.isArray(s.eventHistory)?s.eventHistory.length:(typeof s.eventHistory==='object'?Object.keys(s.eventHistory).length:0);const milestoneList=s.milestones?Object.keys(s.milestones):[];const stats=s.stats||{};return JSON.stringify({day:s.day,season:seasonMap[s.season]||s.season,time:s.time,weather:weatherMap[s.weather]||s.weather,money:s.money,health:s.health+'/'+s.maxHealth,stamina:s.stamina+'/'+s.maxStamina,reputation:s.reputation,mood:s.mood,disasterRate:s.disasterRate,fieldCount:s.fields?s.fields.length:0,fields:s.fields?s.fields.map(f=>({id:f.id,level:f.level,type:f.type,crop:f.crop,stage:f.stage,progress:f.growProgress,fert:f.fertilized})):null,house:s.house,composting:s.composting,storageLimit:s.storageCapacity,researchPoints:s.researchPoints,unlockedTabs:s.unlockedTabs?s.unlockedTabs.length:0,eventCount:eventHist,milestoneCount:milestoneList.length,milestones:milestoneList,questCompleted:s.quests?Object.values(s.quests).filter(Boolean).length:0,skills:skills,skillTotal:Object.values(s.skills||{}).reduce((a,v)=>a+v.level,0),npcList:npcList,petCount:s.pets?Object.keys(s.pets).length:0,totalHarvest:stats.totalHarvest,totalSales:stats.totalSales,version:s.version||'v1',daysPlayed:s.daysPlayed,weatherDuration:s.weatherDuration,gameSpeed:localStorage.getItem('farm_game_speed')||'1'});}catch(e){return JSON.stringify({error:e.message});}})()
